items.name: Apple
items.examine: Crisp, red, and recently someone else's.

items.name: Orange
items.examine: Round, orange, and named with tremendous imagination.

items.name: Saw
items.examine: Cuts wood and conversations equally short.

items.name: Bolt of cloth
items.examine: Guild-grade weave. Hums faintly off-key — best launder it into something wearable.

items.name: Uncut diamond
items.examine: A cloudy stone with expensive intentions.

items.name: Diamond
items.examine: A cut diamond. It catches the light, and everyone's attention.

items.name: Silk
items.examine: Smooth as a fence's alibi.

items.name: Off-key coin
items.examine: A guild-marked coin that hums a sour note. Spend it and people notice; launder it and they don't.

items.name: Clipped coin pouch
items.examine: A coffer pouch, strings still warm. Worth more than the moral cost. Probably.

items.name: Wrightsong mark
items.examine: A stamped timber token. The Guild's way of saying thanks without saying coins.

items.name: Silk climbing rope
items.examine: Three stalls' worth of silk, braided into something that holds your whole reputation.

items.name: Quaver boots
items.examine: Tuned soles. They land a sixteenth-note before you do.

items.name: Graceful hood
items.examine: Light as a rumour. Part of the Graceful set.

items.name: Graceful jerkin
items.examine: Cut for running over rooftops, not from guards. Part of the Graceful set.

items.name: Graceful leggings
items.examine: They make every gap look jumpable. Part of the Graceful set.

items.name: Graceful gloves
items.examine: Grip like a debt collector. Part of the Graceful set.

items.name: Graceful boots
items.examine: So quiet the weir drowns them out entirely. Part of the Graceful set.

items.name: Cutpurse gloves
items.examine: Supple leather, sticky fingers sold separately.

items.name: Box trap
items.examine: A tuned box that closes on anything curious enough to deserve it.

items.name: Chime-moth
items.examine: It rings a perfect E when startled. It is always startled.

items.name: Resonant fowl meat
items.examine: Raw fowl that still hums a little. Cooking fixes the pitch.

items.name: Roast fowl
items.examine: Roasted to a warm, satisfied silence.

items.name: Chincrest
items.examine: A round, resonant critter. Handle gently; it holds a grudge and a charge.

items.name: Marsh-cat fur
items.examine: Plush fur from a marsh-cat that fell for the oldest trick in the reeds.

items.name: Hunter's horn
items.examine: One long note and the marsh leans in to listen.

items.name: Teak logs
items.examine: Dense grove timber. The Wrightsong Guild swears it sings in tune.

items.name: Mahogany logs
items.examine: Dark, heavy, and priced like it knows it.

items.name: Teak plank
items.examine: Sawn teak. Furniture with ambitions.

items.name: Mahogany plank
items.examine: A plank for builds you invite people over to see.

items.name: Tuned hammer
items.examine: Strikes the nail AND the note. Required for the Guild's chiming commissions.

items.name: Wrightsong robe
items.examine: Guild livery. Sawdust is included and non-negotiable.

items.name: Cape of the Quaver
items.examine: Ninety-nine levels of never touching the ground. The weir hums it a fanfare.

objs.name: Tuned beam
objs.examine: A plank over the canal that chimes when you land true.

objs.name: Lock gates
objs.examine: Canal lock gates with a sporting gap between them.

objs.name: Rooftop ladder
objs.examine: Half scaffold, half ladder, all liability.

objs.name: Silk zipline
objs.examine: A taut line over the weir. Bring your own rope, and your own nerve.

objs.name: Chimney gap
objs.examine: Two warm flues and barely a person's width of regret between them.

objs.name: Rooftop gap
objs.examine: The street below is patient. It can wait for you to miss.

objs.name: Spire ridgeline
objs.examine: A run along the bell-spire's ridge. The bell judges your footwork.

objs.name: Silk stall
objs.examine: Fine silks, loosely supervised.

objs.name: Fruit stall
objs.examine: Fresh fruit, priced for the honest and free for the quick.

objs.name: Coffer stall
objs.examine: The Guild's counting table. The coins hum; the guards hum back.

objs.name: Relic stall
objs.examine: Resonant curios under glass. The glass is mostly a suggestion.

objs.name: Box trap
objs.examine: A set box trap, humming an inviting little tune.

objs.name: Pitfall
objs.examine: Reeds laid over a hole. Convincing, if you're a marsh-cat.

objs.name: High box trap
objs.examine: A reinforced box trap tuned for something with opinions.

objs.name: Guild workbench
objs.examine: A Wrightsong bench. The vice hums when the work is good.

objs.name: Sawmill bench
objs.examine: Logs in, planks out, coins gone. The Guild calls it alchemy.

objs.name: Contract board
objs.examine: Guild commissions, paid in Wrightsong marks. The ink never dries before the work changes.

objs.name: Fence's table
objs.examine: A plain table where off-key coins learn to sing in tune. For a cut.

objs.name: Murmur weir
objs.examine: The river drops an octave here and never stops humming about it.

objs.name: Canal lock
objs.examine: A lock that raises barges and lowers expectations.

objs.name: Wrightsong scaffold
objs.examine: Permanently temporary, like everything in Quaverside.

objs.name: Wrightsong banner
objs.examine: A timber-and-quaver crest. It flaps in 4/4 time.

objs.name: Trophy mount
objs.examine: A mounted marsh-cat with an expression of mild surprise.

objs.name: Teak tree
objs.examine: Grove-grown teak. The Guild planted it singing; it grew up sarcastic.

objs.name: Mahogany tree
objs.examine: Dark timber for bright commissions.

npcs.name: Market loiterer
npcs.examine: Here for the atmosphere, and whatever isn't nailed down.

npcs.name: Silk merchant
npcs.examine: Sells silk by the bolt and buys excuses by the dozen.

npcs.name: Guild treasurer
npcs.examine: Counts the Wrightsong coffers twice. Misses things exactly once.

npcs.name: Gilded noble
npcs.examine: Wears a quarter of the district's wealth and none of its sense.

npcs.name: Sly Maren
npcs.examine: Knows what you stole. Knows what it's worth. Knows a guy.

npcs.name: Foreward Oss
npcs.examine: Foreman of the Wrightsong Guild. Half her sentences are load-bearing.

npcs.name: Clerk Tilba
npcs.examine: Sells everything the four trades forgot to pack.

npcs.name: Vaultwright Senna
npcs.examine: Keeps the district's coin in tune and in trust.

sharedEdits.what: Add the four Quaverside stall entries to the STALLS record (~line 186, after gem_stall). Pure data; the existing 'thieve' intent resolves them.
Register the Quaverside intent domains (qv-train / qv-trap-lay / qv-trap-check / qv-saw / qv-build / qv-launder / qv-redeem). Add directly below the intent-produce import (~line 40).
sharedEdits.snippet: import './intent-quaverside'; // side-effect: registers Quaverside agility/hunter/construction domain intents

sharedEdits.what: Load the Quaverside client pack (course, stalls, traps, yard, masters).
